name: keeper-shell
description: Brokered credential request shell over Keeper-backed records (Microsoft Teams tab SPA).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
